All right, welcome back to the playbook. We are now going over external plays. Okay, so these are plays that are marketed and advertised to cold traffic or non-members of yours, mostly people who have never heard of you, who see your ads and want to sign up for the challenge that you're marketing. Okay, in this playbook you'll find the six-week challenge, the 42-day detox, the reactivation play, and the 12-week HTP. Okay, these are the plays that we have designed to be marketed to cold traffic. Now you can market any of the other ones as well, but these ones are optimized for cold traffic. So in each of these we have a lead capture share funnel that you can import into your click funnels and it is designed to capture leads based on the play that you are running. But go through all of the materials before you attack the fulfillment, it's all in here. So pick the play that you want to run that kind of tells you what kind of wrapper you're putting on it and then everything you all everything else you'll need is here for you to be able to just absolutely crush it.
